title: Yubico and Delinea Close the Agentic AI Accountability Gap
full_text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mar. 19, 2026-- Yubico (NASDAQ STOCKHOLM: YUBICO) and Delinea today announced a joint integration that closes a critical gap in agentic AI security: the accountability gap between knowing who an AI agent is and proving that a verified human authorized what it did. The
